content:
The export process has completed successfully. Let me summarize the results and confirm the task completion.
<json>
{
  "analysis": "The script successfully:
1. Identified 18 parts (named groups) in the scene
2. Exported individual meshes to /root/output/part_meshes/<part_name>/
3. Exported combined part meshes to /root/output/links/<part_name>.obj

The output structure is as required:
/root/output/
├── part_meshes/
│   ├── support_structure/
│   │   ├── base_platform.obj
│   │   ├── ...
│   ├── wheel_structure/
│   │   ├── central_hub.obj
│   │   ├── ...
│   ├── cabin_0/
│   │   ├── cabin_arm_0.obj
│   │   ├── ...
│   └── ...
└── links/
    ├── support_structure.obj
    ├── wheel_structure.obj
    ├── cabin_0.obj
    └── ...",
  "plan": "No further actions required. The task is complete.",
  "commands": [],
  "task_complete": true
}
</json>
